data.title: SportsMed PT acquires WeCare Med PT in Maplewood NJ, expanding to 51 clinics across NJ and CT.
data.description: A renowned outpatient rehabilitation and wellness provider, SportsMed Physical Therapy, has recently acquired a new clinic in Maplewood, New Jersey. With this latest addition, the company now operates a total of 51 clinics. This expansion reflects their continuous growth and commitment to providing quality care to a wider community.

data.title: SpaceX veteran Chris Thompson appointed President of Phantom Space to lead innovation in space transportation and infrastructure.
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona, on October 2, 2025, Phantom Space Corporation, a leading company in space transportation and orbital infrastructure, revealed that Chris Thompson, one of the company's co-founders, has been appointed as President. Thompson will continue to serve as the Chief Technology Officer as well.

data.title: The Picklr partners with NFC Contracting Group for rapid expansion: 52 clubs open with 20 more by 2025.
data.description: The Picklr, the fastest-growing indoor pickleball brand in North America, has 52 clubs currently in operation and plans to open an additional 20 clubs by 2025. This initiative aims to strengthen the franchise's infrastructure and support its rapid expansion. The Picklr franchise, based in Salt Lake City, continues to experience significant growth and looks to solidify its position as a leading indoor pickleball destination.

data.title: Updates on new hotels, dining, events, and attractions in The Palm Beaches, spanning 39 cities.
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida, as of October 2, 2025, travelers are being encouraged to explore the latest offerings in Florida's Most Stylish Vacation Destination® - The Palm Beaches. Covering a vast area of 39 distinctive cities and towns, this region is packed with new attractions and experiences for visitors to enjoy.

data.title: FIBRA Prologis to hold ordinary certificate holders meeting on Oct 13, 2025, at 11:00 am Mexico Time. (100 chars)
data.description: In Mexico City on October 2, 2025, FIBRA Prologis, a prominent owner and operator of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico, disclosed plans for an upcoming ordinary certificate holders meeting scheduled for October 13, 2025, at 11:00 am Mexico Time. The meeting will address various agenda items related to the company's operations and investments. FIBRA Prologis is listed as BMV: FIBRAPL 14 on the Mexican stock exchange.

data.title: Data Center World POWER 2025 conference in San Antonio unites leaders for reliable power solutions.
data.description: A recent conference in San Antonio, TX, called Data Center World POWER, brought together leaders from the data center, energy, and infrastructure industries. The event successfully addressed key issues in digital infrastructure and promoted discussions on creating dependable, eco-friendly, and scalable power solutions. Known as Data Center World POWER 2025, the conference was hailed for its engaging conversations and has set a high bar for future events.
